label: Send to endpoint
description: Send data to an HTTP endpoint. URL and body can use row variables (e.g. endpointUrl). Use {{variableName}} in URL, body, or headers to substitute values from the current run. Optionally wait for the response and save it to a row variable.

inputs.description: Endpoint URL (literal or leave empty to use row variable)
Row variable for URL when url is empty (e.g. endpointUrl)
Row variable whose value is the request body (with {{var}} substitution)

outputs.description: Row variable to store the response (full body or value at responsePath)

formSchema.label: Endpoint URL
formSchema.placeholder: https://api.example.com/webhook or leave empty to use row variable
formSchema.hint: Literal URL or leave empty and set Row variable for URL below.

formSchema.label: Row variable for URL (if URL empty)
Body template
formSchema.hint: Use {{variableName}} for values from the current row. Ignored when Body source is Row variable.

formSchema.label: Row variable for body (when Body source = Row variable)
Body Content-Type (when no header set)
formSchema.hint: Used only if Headers do not set Content-Type.

formSchema.label: Headers (optional, JSON or key: value lines)
Response path (optional, dot notation)
formSchema.hint: Extract a nested value from JSON response. Leave empty to save full response.

formSchema.label: Timeout (ms)
formSchema.hint: Abort request after this many milliseconds. Leave empty for no timeout.

formSchema.label: Retry count
formSchema.hint: Number of retries on failure (0 = no retry).
